name: openforge
description: AI-powered workspace for understanding repositories and contributing to open source.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @openforge/shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend "npm run dev -w @openforge/shared" "npm run dev -w @openforge/backend" "npm run dev -w @openforge/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @openforge/shared && npm run build -w @openforge/backend && npm run build -w @openforge/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @openforge/shared && npm run build -w @openforge/shared && npm run typecheck -w @openforge/backend && npm run typecheck -w @openforge/frontend
